title: Analytics - Firmware Update Started
scenario: DFU firmware update start event does not populate device-specific Firebase analytics elements (Device PID, Charge Unit PID, Update Type, Target Language ID) within expected timeframe
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and ensure a Poly Bluetooth audio device is connected.
3. Go to Device Settings → [Connected Device Name] → Firmware Update.
4. Initiate a DFU (firmware update) process on the connected device.
5. Open the Firebase Analytics console for the Poly Studio Mobile app.
6. Verify that the default analytics elements are displayed: graph, events in the last 30 minutes, event count by country/gender, events per session, app version, app build, and app environment.
7. Verify that the following device-specific elements are also present: Device PID, Charge Unit PID, Update Type, and Target Language ID.
8. Wait a few hours after the DFU process has started.
9. Return to the Firebase Analytics console and check the event count for the device-specific elements (Device PID, Charge Unit PID, Update Type, Target Language ID).
expected: After a few hours, the event count for the device-specific elements (Device PID, Charge Unit PID, Update Type, Target Language ID) should have increased, indicating that the DFU start event was logged correctly.
